input.query: What is the difference between CC Express and Gupshup Console / Conversation Cloud? Is CC Express just a branding alias or are there differences in included modules, features, or access?

output.answer: CC Express is a silent alias for Gupshup Console / Conversation Cloud. All features available in Console are also available to CC Express users. Agent Assist is included as part of the Console platform for customer support and agent productivity. For specific pricing tiers and plan details, please contact your Gupshup account manager.
